summary: Comprehensive TradeLife platform frontend testing completed successfully. All core functionality verified: login/onboarding/dashboard flow, UI components, 3-column layout, dark theme, and interactive elements.
passed_tests: Login page loads with all required elements (email input, password input, Sign in button, Google auth button)
Login form accepts input and navigates to onboarding
Onboarding page loads with 6 step indicator
Onboarding step navigation: Welcome → Business → Trade → Team → Theme → Finish (all 6 steps)
TopBar contains all required elements: logo, EN flag, TradeLife text, bell, settings, menu, avatar
Left column has 3 panels: Attention Needed (3 items), Active Projects (3 items), Active Trades (4 items)
Center column has AI Core hero with T button, 3 action buttons (New Quote, New Invoice, Reports), 4 stat cards
Right column has 3 panels: Schedule (4 items), Urgent Tasks (4 items), Financial Overview
All interactive elements are clickable (TopBar buttons, action buttons)
Dark theme properly applied with correct CSS custom properties
47 data-testid attributes found on interactive elements
No unwanted visual effects (gradients, glows, animations) detected
Clean structural design without WebGL or complex animations
